__comment__: Committed Test262 subset. Rollout cadence tracked on issue #69. Compile-mode cooperative cancellation landed via #74 — loop backedges + event-loop drain call $Runtime.CheckCancellation so infinite loops unwind on timeout. Two folders held out of compile mode (compiledExcludeFolders): Promise (regen runs excessively long; per-test IL compile/load overhead dominates) and Object (compile-mode regen ran testhost to 28GB RAM before manual kill — Object is the largest folder by far at 3,411 tests, and per-test dynamic assembly accumulation OOMs the runner). Both need profiling / per-test isolation before joining compile mode.
